name: The Bad Girls Gang
description:
No one did Doom, or Pigtail bot... So I decided to CONNECT ALL TRIO: KITTY KAT, DOOM, AND PIGTAIL INTO ONE BOT! (Now you can pick First Message, love this update- Suggestions about new scenarios are well appreciated!)

The bot has some lore from the movie. I tried to make it as accurate as possible to their character in the movie. They're bad... dangerous... or whatever you can think of in your wacky scenarios.

Jaintor needs more Characters where we can make our scenarios!

That's why you can pick between creating your scenario or picking up Scenario! (More scenarios soon.)

For the best experience, use Proxy AI like Deepseek or Gemini!

Have fun doing funny, serious, or other kinds of stories with them...

update logs:

  • 1.0 - basic version

  • 1.1 - Added a new opening message (Trying to do something similar to the canonical movie encounter- SUGGESTIONS FOR OTHER SCENARIOS WELL APRECIATED).

  • 1.2 - Added some new Example dialogs, to make Characters talk more in the way like in the movie. Also added Pigtail's luchador costume.
creator: kubixj3
